observation_note: Regular-session close (16:00 America/New_York = 20:00Z) on 2026-07-17. Each price below is the contract's daily closing (last regular-session trade) price on that date; volume is the contract's day volume. Because closes are last-trades, quotes are not perfectly synchronous across strikes.
spot_source: SPY daily closing price on 2026-07-17, Massive.com aggregates endpoint (/v2/aggs/ticker/SPY).
rate_assumption: Flat continuously-compounded risk-free rate of 3.8%, taken from US Treasury constant-maturity yields at the 1- to 3-month tenors (3.76% to 3.84%) on 2026-07-16, the trading day nearest the observation date (no 2026-07-17 record was published). Source: Massive.com /fed/v1/treasury-yields. A single flat rate is used across the 35-91 day maturities; the calibration is insensitive to a few basis points at these tenors.
dividend_assumption: Assumed continuous dividend yield of 1.2%, SPY's approximate trailing distribution yield. A documented assumption, not implied from the quotes; the implied forward it produces is consistent with the observed put and call prices (no put/call skew discontinuity).
source: Massive.com options daily open-close endpoint (/v1/open-close/{contract}/2026-07-17). Prices are regular-session closing (last) trades; volumes are that day's contract volume.
licensing: Market data retrieved via the Massive.com market-data API. This file is a small derived research snapshot (18 end-of-day closing prices) included solely to test calibration on real quotes; it is not a redistribution of the provider's full dataset. Any downstream redistribution should follow the data provider's terms of service.
exercise_note: SPY options are American-style. Only out-of-the-money options are included (puts for strikes below spot, calls for strikes at or above spot), the side on which the early-exercise premium over the European value is small; they are treated as European for Black-Scholes inversion and Heston calibration. This is a documented approximation and a limitation of the dataset.
cleaning_rules: Only out-of-the-money options are included: puts for strikes below spot, calls for strikes at or above spot -- the liquid, low-intrinsic side where the American/European difference is small.
A quote is excluded if its day volume is below the configured minimum (illiquid, so its closing last-trade is likely stale).
A quote is excluded if its price is non-positive (missing or zero).
A quote is excluded if its price violates the no-arbitrage bounds for its type (below the discounted intrinsic value or above the discounted forward for a call / discounted strike for a put).
A quote is excluded if its price has no Black-Scholes implied volatility (cannot be inverted, or sits at the volatility floor).
A quote is excluded if its implied volatility falls outside a sane band (below the floor or above the ceiling).
Every exclusion is reported with its reason; the calibration runs on the surviving quotes and reports how many were excluded.
